title: Charles Shafiq Karthiga
overview: Charles wants to catch hold of Karthiga and make her understand his love for her. Shaffiq needs Karthiga to get back the smuggled diamonds that he had entrusted with her. Meanwhile, Karthiga witnesses a murder at her deserted office and the killers are after her.
